source.name: Chapter 1.6: 6.4 Knowledge Check - when to use sub-agent
source.instructions: **When should you use a sub-agent instead of tools in the main agent?**

answers.answer: When you want to delegate a whole task to another agent that runs until it completes
When you have more than one flow

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT decide when to use sub-agents
source.guidance: Use sub-agents to delegate a whole task; use tools in the main agent for dynamic tool calls in one context.
